title: Death Note Mod
description: A minecraft mod that adds death note items from the Anime!
body:
# Death Note Mod

A Fabric Minecraft mod for Version 1.21 that adds a few new items to the game from the death note anime! Craft the deadly book and go on a killing spree! 

The book can kill **any entities and player, including yourself.**
